content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Floor in a BST". Refer to LeetCode description: N/A
constraints: 1 <= Number of nodes in the BST <= 10^4
content.inputFormat: The input will contain a binary search tree and a target value. The binary search tree will be represented as a list of nodes where each node is a list containing the node's value and references to its left and right children. The target value will be an integer.
content.outputFormat: The output will be the largest value in the binary search tree that is less than or equal to the target value.

solution.approach: Recursive/Iterative traversal of the binary search tree to find the floor value
solution.timeComplexity: O(h) where h is the height of the binary search tree
solution.spaceComplexity: O(h) where h is the height of the binary search tree
